title: Integrate a User-Defined Database Connector with Uniface
breadcrumbs: Integrate a User-Defined Database Connector with Uniface
text: Integrate a User-Defined Database Connector with Uniface Uniface allows you to define up to ten user-defined DBMS connectors, called UD0 through UD9, in every installation of Uniface or the Uniface Server. Implement the top-level connector function with the correct name and return type. The user-defined connectors UD0 through UD9 must have a top-level connector function called UDBUD0() through UDBUD9() The function has return type long and has a parameter that is the pointer to the uctrl structure. Here is an example of the top-level connector function of the user-defined connector UD0: #include "unidbm.h" /* User-defined DBMS connector UD0. */ long UDBUD0(struct uctrl *control_block); { long retval; /* Return value. */ /* Invoke the requested connector function. */ switch ( control_block->func ) { case ‘L’: retval = ud0_logon(control_block); break; case ‘I’: retval = ud0_info(control_block); break; /* ... */ } return retval; } Copy Compile the connector functions using the include file unidbm.h , located in the /3gl subdirectory of the Uniface installation. The top-level connector function and the user-defined functions called by it must be compiled into an object file, a set of object files, or an object library. For more information, consult your operating system or compiler documentation. You must use the include file from exactly the same Uniface maintenance release with which the connector is linked. Run the Uniface installation program in the installation directory and select the correct user-defined connector. For more information, see the relevant information for your connector guide. On some operating systems, the installation program asks for a link information line. The installation program incorporates this line in the link command files that link Uniface applications or the Uniface Server. The link information line is specific to your operating system. For more information, see Link Information Related Links Develop a Database Connector Incrementally During connector development, you can integrate an incomplete DBMS connector with Uniface for testing purposes.
